prompt: Give me a quick snapshot of all the Year 1 results: units, revenue, variable costs, contribution, EBIT, tax, and net income.
assertions: Runs idfa_ops.py read with multiple names in a single command (e.g., 'read <file> Units_Y1 Revenue_Y1 Variable_Costs_Y1 Contribution_Y1 EBIT_Y1 Tax_Y1 Net_Income_Y1')
Returns values for all requested Named Ranges in one JSON response
Presents the values in a clear, formatted summary for the user
Does not make 7 separate read calls when one batch call suffices
